title: Search box typing lag under product-card load
summary: Typing gets laggy after the third character because every keypress does too much work and also triggers a request.
signals: Typing gets much slower after 3+ characters
Most time is spent filtering and highlighting before the screen updates
Every keypress also sends a network request

title: Latest query loses to stale search results
summary: Cached results and slower network results both update the same list, so an older query can briefly show up again.
signals: Results briefly jump back to an older query
Cached and network results both update the same results list
Debounce reduced traffic, but the stale flash is still there

title: Modal opens visually but fails screen-reader users
summary: The modal looks fine on screen, but keyboard focus escapes behind it and screen readers do not announce it properly.
signals: Tab moves behind the modal
Screen reader does not announce the modal title
Focus does not return to the button that opened it

title: Realtime feed leaks sockets and listeners
summary: Route changes and filter changes keep adding listeners, so old listeners stay alive and still use old filter values.
signals: Events start showing up more than once after route or filter changes
Some duplicates still mention old filter values
Listener and subscription counts keep growing

title: Context update causes rerender storm
summary: One big shared context holds too much fast-changing state, so typing in one place rerenders parts of the page that did not actually change.
signals: Typing rerenders parts of the page that did not change
One context update rerenders lots of components
The provider creates a new value object on every update

title: Autosave overwrites the latest draft
summary: If the network is slow, an older autosave response can still overwrite what the user typed a moment later.
signals: Text jumps back to an older version
Saved state clears too early
Easy to reproduce on a slow network

title: OnPush order row stays stale after a live update
summary: A live order update arrives, but the row keeps showing the old status until the user clicks, sorts, or filters the table.
signals: The socket event arrives, but the row still shows the old status
Sorting or filtering suddenly makes the right status appear
The service mutates the existing order object in place

title: Cart badge and cart page drift out of sync
summary: The header badge and the cart page stop agreeing because one feature quietly creates a second CartService instance.
signals: The header shows 3 items while the cart page shows 0
Refreshing the cart page briefly 'fixes' only one side
The feature component has its own CartService provider

title: Pinia filter label stays stale after a store update
summary: The product grid updates, but one filter label stays old because store state was destructured into plain values.
signals: The list reacts, but the selected filter pill stays old
A page reload or remount suddenly shows the right value
The component destructures Pinia store state directly

title: Draft note jumps to the wrong row after adding at the top
summary: The list updates, but edit state and draft text jump to the wrong row because `v-for` is keyed by index instead of item identity.
signals: Text typed into one row appears under a different row after insert
Edit mode sticks to the wrong item after reordering
The list uses `:key="index"`
